Yes, I will be doing a Conversation with him soon. Most of all (but not [exclusively](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=78379ea3cbf08d2b1667bb5df6fc1f812b69d09d4323618bf95c0a8f0a68af36&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91488&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=bf24979a3f251f65bfc55efbdd1ba047&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9lbi53aWtpcGVkaWEub3JnL3dpa2kvSSUyN21fTm90X1RoZXJl&email_id=c3d02b4cfe1bb37bd07b4d27beb631cf)) about his three recent books [Liberalism: In Defense of Freedom](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=03bb469e0e28dfc197c514f710e0d85ca9c59792381133979e4af1fd85dfd278&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91488&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=9d28c3e374572fb93017fb73b313587b&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=c3d02b4cfe1bb37bd07b4d27beb631cf), [Manipulation: What It Is, Why It Is Bad, What To Do About It](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=08fe269f820fe17bdcbc5ddc5f92930ebbde4d64907a3dcfb8f2e4284940f246&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91488&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=aa24babce446b232b909d392fe1e723c&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=c3d02b4cfe1bb37bd07b4d27beb631cf), and [Imperfect Oracle: What AI Can and Cannot Do](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=248ade46f8ca84fdc36acc43c8e471bdec389bf039e5c0389fd54c076d91abe2&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91488&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=27ac04034de24bf7ff5fce20401461de&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=c3d02b4cfe1bb37bd07b4d27beb631cf).
So what should I ask him?
